# dokku_app (Resource)

Manages a Dokku app deployed from a registry image (`dokku apps:create` + `dokku git:from-image`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `image` (String) Full container image reference to deploy, e.g. registry.example.com/org/app:tag.
- `name` (String) App name.

### Optional

- `registry_password` (String, Sensitive) Password or token for registry authentication.
- `registry_server` (String) Registry server to authenticate against before deploying, e.g. registry.example.com. Omit for Docker Hub public images.
- `registry_username` (String) Username for registry authentication.

### Read-Only

- `deployed_sha` (String) Deploy revision reported by Dokku for the current deploy.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
